relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The temple and worshipers are measured.
The outer court and holy city enter symbolic pressure.
Two witnesses prophesy clothed in sackcloth.
They stand as olive trees and lampstands.
They bear Moses-Elijah signs of judgment.
When witness is complete, the beast opposes and silences them.
Their bodies lie in the great city of empire-symbols.
Earth-dwellers celebrate the silencing of witness.
Breath of life enters, and they stand.
The witnesses are called upward before watching enemies.
The city shakes, and the rest give glory.
The seventh trumpet declares the world-reign become Divine-Messiah reign.
Reward and justice arrive, including judgment on earth-destroyers.
Heaven's temple opens and covenant ark is seen.

contemplative_note: Revelation 11 is witness under empire: silenced witness rises by breath, and the trumpet declares reign against those destroying earth.
